sentences.target: C'est du délire au café aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: C'est du délire au café aujourd'hui.
translations.en: It's crazy at the café today.
translations.es: Hoy la cafetería está de locos.
translations.de: Im Café ist es heute total verrückt.
translations.pt: Hoje o café está uma loucura.
translations.tr: Bugün kafede tam bir çılgınlık var.
translations.vi: Hôm nay quán cà phê đông khủng khiếp.
translations.nl: Het is vandaag een gekkenhuis in het café.
translations.pl: Dzisiaj w kawiarni jest istne szaleństwo.
translations.nb: Det er helt kaos på kaféen i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini di kafe lagi gila-gilaan.
translations.sv: Det är helt galet på kaféet idag.
translations.cs: Dnes je v kavárně úplné šílenství.
translations.da: Der er helt vildt på caféen i dag.
translations.fi: Tänään kahvilassa on ihan hullua menoa.
translations.ja: 今日はカフェがめちゃくちゃ混んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun ‘ce’ used in the copular construction.
3rd person singular present of ‘être’; copula linking the subject and predicate.
Partitive article introducing an indefinite mass/quantity before the noun.
Common masculine noun serving as the predicate nominal after ‘c’est’.
Preposition ‘à’ fused with ‘le’; introduces a locative complement.
Common masculine noun; object of the preposition ‘au’ indicating place.
Temporal adverb situating the event in time.

sentences.target: Ton délire me fatigue un peu.

translations.fr: Ton délire me fatigue un peu.
translations.en: Your craziness tires me a bit.
translations.es: Tus locuras me cansan un poco.
translations.de: Dein Wahnsinn strengt mich ein bisschen an.
translations.it: Le tue follie mi stancano un po'.
translations.pt: As suas loucuras me cansam um pouco.
translations.vi: Sự điên rồ của bạn làm tôi hơi mệt.
translations.nl: Jouw gedoe maakt me een beetje moe.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी हरकतें मुझे थोड़ा थका देती हैं.
translations.el: Οι τρέλες σου με κουράζουν λίγο.
translations.nb: Dine påfunn gjør meg litt sliten.
translations.sv: Dina upptåg gör mig lite trött.
translations.da: Din galskab gør mig lidt træt.
translations.ja: あなたの騒ぎに少し疲れています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with a masculine singular noun.
Common masculine noun; subject of the verb.
1st person clitic object pronoun; direct object of ‘fatigue’.
3rd person singular present of a transitive verb.
Indefinite article forming the set phrase ‘un peu’.
Noun meaning ‘little’; with ‘un’ forms an adverbial quantity phrase modifying the verb.

translations.es: Vamos a parar esta tontería ahora.
translations.it: Mettiamo fine a questo delirio adesso.
translations.ko: 이 말도 안 되는 짓은 이제 그만해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们现在就停止这胡闹。
translations.yue: 我哋而家就停止呢場胡鬧。
translations.pt: Vamos acabar com essa loucura agora.
translations.he: אנחנו מפסיקים את השטויות האלה עכשיו.
translations.vi: Chúng ta dừng chuyện vớ vẩn này ngay bây giờ.
translations.hi: हम इस बकवास को अभी खत्म करते हैं.
translations.id: Kita hentikan omong kosong ini sekarang.
translations.sv: Vi stoppar den här dumheten nu.
translations.da: Vi stopper det her pjat nu.
translations.ja: この馬鹿げたことは今すぐ終わらせます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun, often used for ‘we’.
3rd person singular present finite verb; main predicate.
Demonstrative determiner marking a specific referent.
Common masculine noun; direct object of ‘arrête’.
Temporal adverb indicating immediacy.

sentences.target: Je comprends pas votre délire sur le loyer.
sentences.reading: /ʒə kɔ̃pʁɑ̃ pa vɔtʁə deliʁ syʁ lə lwaje/

translations.fr: Je comprends pas votre délire sur le loyer.
translations.ipa: /ʒə kɔ̃pʁɑ̃ pa vɔtʁə deliʁ syʁ lə lwaje/
translations.en: I don't understand your nonsense about the rent.
translations.es: No entiendo su rollo con el alquiler.
translations.de: Ich verstehe Ihren Quatsch mit der Miete nicht.
translations.it: Non capisco il vostro delirio sull'affitto.
translations.ko: 월세에 대한 당신들의 헛소리를 이해 못하겠어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我不明白你们关于房租的胡扯。
translations.yue: 我唔明你哋關於租金嘅噏嘢。
translations.ru: Я не понимаю вашу чушь насчёт аренды.
translations.pt: Não entendo a sua conversa fiada sobre o aluguel.
translations.he: אני לא מבין את השטויות שלכם לגבי שכר הדירה.
translations.vi: Tôi không hiểu mấy chuyện vớ vẩn của các bạn về tiền thuê nhà.
translations.nl: Ik begrijp jullie onzin over de huur niet.
translations.uk: Я не розумію вашу нісенітницю щодо оренди.
translations.hu: Nem értem az önök hülyeségét a lakbérrel kapcsolatban.
translations.hi: मुझे आपके किराए वाली बकवास समझ नहीं आती.
translations.pl: Nie rozumiem waszych bzdur na temat czynszu.
translations.el: Δεν καταλαβαίνω τις ανοησίες σας για το ενοίκιο.
translations.nb: Jeg forstår ikke tullet deres om husleien.
translations.id: Aku tidak mengerti omong kosong kalian soal uang sewa.
translations.sv: Jag förstår inte ert trams om hyran.
translations.ro: Nu înțeleg prostiile voastre despre chirie.
translations.da: Jeg forstår ikke jeres vrøvl om huslejen.
translations.ja: 家賃についてのあなたたちのばかげた話は理解できません。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
1st person singular present of a transitive verb; main predicate.
Negation adverb (colloquial omission of ‘ne’).
Possessive determiner modifying the noun.
Common masculine noun; direct object/theme of ‘comprends’.
Preposition introducing a topic or domain.
Definite article agreeing with a masculine singular noun.
Common masculine noun; object of the preposition ‘sur’.

Ton délire me fatigue un peu.
Je comprends pas votre délire sur le loyer.
fu: /ʒə kɔ̃pʁɑ̃ pa vɔtʁə deliʁ syʁ lə lwaje/

Je comprends pas votre délire sur le loyer.

en: It's crazy at the café today.
Your craziness tires me a bit.
I don't understand your nonsense about the rent.
